global.description: The ad features a vibrant purple background with meal selection interfaces and promotional text.
global.main_message: Promoting meal options with a special offer.

elements.label: Purple background
elements.description: A solid purple background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: Main offer text
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'Hungry? We got you €19.90' with a smaller text below indicating 'Try for free'.
elements.text_content: Hungry? We got you €19.90 D Try for free

elements.label: SnapMeal logo
elements.description: The logo of SnapMeal displayed in a bold font at the top left corner.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small badge in the top right corner with the word 'SALE' in bold letters.

elements.label: User-generated content label
elements.description: A small label in the top left corner indicating 'UGC' in a white font.
